nasb.text: “Because of the multitude of oppressions they cry out; They cry for help because of the arm of the mighty.

esv.text: “Because of the multitude of oppressions people cry out; they call for help because of the arm of the mighty.

cnv.text: 他們因多受欺壓而呼叫， 因受強權者的壓制而呼求。

ccb.text: “人们因饱受压迫而呼求， 因强权者的压制而求救。
